title: FULLY FREE Unlimited API + OpenCode: MiniMax M3,Step 3.7 Flash,Nemotron 3 Ultra,GLM,Kimi!
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion API, a compound model system that sends prompts to multiple models and uses a judge model to select the final answer. The creator tested it against claimed Fable-level performance and found inconsistent results across real-world tasks, noting it can be slower and more expensive than using strong single models.
writeup: The video covers OpenRouter's Fusion API, a compound model system that routes a prompt to multiple models and then uses a judge model to pick the final answer, paired with OpenCode for free access to models including MiniMax M3, Step 3.7 Flash, Nemotron 3 Ultra, GLM, and Kimi. The creator tests Fusion against its claimed Fable-level performance on real-world tasks. The takeaway is that results were inconsistent across those tasks, and the ensemble approach can be slower and more expensive than running a strong single model.
